expectations.text: Status values defined with as const and type derived via typeof, not a hand-written union
expectations.evidence: Uses a hand-written union type: type PaymentStatus = 'pending' | 'completed' | 'failed' | 'refunded'. No as const object or typeof derivation present.

expectations.text: Return type is a specific union (e.g. BadgeColor), not string
expectations.evidence: Function signature is function getPaymentBadgeColor(status: PaymentStatus): string. Return type is string, not a named union type.

expectations.text: No runtime default fallback value -- missing cases are compile errors only
expectations.evidence: Switch statement includes default: return 'gray' which is a runtime fallback. Missing cases would silently return gray rather than producing a compile error.

expectations.text: Uses Record<Status, Color> or exhaustive switch with never check
expectations.evidence: Uses a switch statement but includes a default branch with a fallback return. No never check is present.

expectations.text: Uses named export, not default export
expectations.evidence: Neither export function nor export default appears. The function and type are not exported at all.

assertion_critique: All 5 assertions failed without the skill -- strong discriminating power for this eval
